title: 2 Dudes and a Dream
overview: As flabby Sebastian strives to become a model, lowly usher Tom hustles to make it as an actor. While pursuing fame and fortune together, the naïve duo stumble into zany adventures, learn absurd Hollywood lessons and build a meaningful friendship.
